title: calathea ornata var. majestica
intro: Calathea ornata var. majestica, also known as the 'Pinstripe Calathea', is a rare and exotic variety of the Calathea ornata plant, characterized by its striking, dark green leaves adorned with vibrant, white stripes. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Brazil, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Calathea ornata var. majestica include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with respiratory and gastrointestinal issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Calathea ornata var. majestica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are said to promote digestive health and ease stress.
